---
title: "Camila Pacheco Riaño, PhD"
description: "Personal website of Camila Pacheco-Riaño, global change ecologist and biogeographer."
about:
  template: trestles
  image: media/IO.jpg
  links:
    - text: "{{< iconify simple-icons:bluesky >}} @lacapary"
      href: https://bsky.app/profile/lacapary.bsky.social
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/lacapary/
    - text: "{{< ai researchgate >}} Researchgate"
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/L-Camila-Pacheco-Riano
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=EsZhToUAAAAJ&hl=en
    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}} ORCID"
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-8539-4816
    - icon: twitter-x
      text: "@lacapary"
      href: https://twitter.com/lacapary

---

<p class="homepage-name">Camila Pacheco Riaño, PhD</p>
<span class="discipline-tag">Global Change Ecology · Biogeography</span>

I am an ecologist and biogeographer, which means I study how life is spread across the planet, whether that’s on a single mountain slope or across an entire continent.

My interest in nature started early, growing up in the Andean mountains around Bogota - Colombia. Today, a lot of my work focuses on how climate change is shifting where different species can actually live and survive. I’m currently based in Sweden, but I still get out into the field whenever I can, usually with a camera in my bag.

## Contact

* University of Gothenburg
* Medicinaregatan 7B, 41390 Göteborg, Sweden

<center>
  <a href="mailto:pachecoriano.c@gmail.com?subject=Subject&body=Body%20Text" class="btn btn-outline-primary" role="button">
    <i class="fa fa-envelope"></i> Email Me
  </a>
</center>

<br>
<p style="text-align: center;">*I'll be happy to get in touch!*</p>
